subcodes.first_line: In this day the Mother Book crieth out before the faces of all parties and, through the grace of the Most Great Name, summoneth the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ام الکتاب امام وجوه احزاب ندا میفرماید و اهل عالم را بعنایت اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @justice and wrath of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
